technology_gate.input: vLLM-style request/decode trace plus allocated KV block map and pending decode candidates
technology_gate.decision: prefetch next decode KV pages only when memory pressure is below the prefetch budget
technology_gate.metric: prefetch hit rate, wasted prefetch blocks, TPOT p95, decode p95, throughput, queue wait, OOM/rejection rate

selection_reason: page prefetch improved TPOT/e2e/throughput without OOM regression
remaining_work: replace synthetic trace with exported vLLM scheduler logs
wire policy into a real vLLM fork before claiming framework-internal modification
measure physical GPU page/cache prefetch separately before claiming CUDA cp.async
